task_objective: Guard correlation calculations against zero-variance columns
design_decisions: Used Ibis `.nullif(0)` on the product of standard deviations in Pearson and Spearman calculations to prevent division by zero.
Implemented a `_sanitize_matrix` helper to replace any NaN/Inf values with `None` before returning the final correlation results.
results: Correlation matrices no longer contain NaN/Inf for constant or all-null columns. Verified with new unit tests. Full suite passes with 90% coverage.
